items.title: Creating Our Own History
items.caption: We still tell the past, but we also going to tell the future now. Our most important thing is our kids and their kids being connected. To protect this place.

items.title: Finding a Reason to Get Out of Bed
items.caption: When we're drinking, the purpose for me to get up every morning was to go look for my next drink. That was my purpose in life. But the world has changed, and we

items.title: Oonchiumpa: What Happens When Community Leads
Just Be There for Them
items.caption: Just encourage them the best you can. Just be there, supportive. Family's there, but it's always good to have that extra support on the side.

items.title: The Little Boat Called Ivy May
items.caption: My dad built a boat. The little boat was named Ivy May, after my two sisters. When they brought the food back, it fed us. We were happy and content.
